posts.name: Senne Van Putte
posts.text:
*** Discussion title: Higgs Combination
Dear experts,
I was trying to combine two different analysis into one datacard.
However it turns out two processes received slightly different names,
while representing the same process: FAKE vs Fake and
darkHiggs_<masspoint> vs DH_<masspoint>.
Is there a way to rename the processes using combine?
Cheers, Senne
posts.cooked_html:
*** Discussion title: Higgs Combination

Dear experts,
